PTK_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "1E4014C64051DC122BEFA48857E25F1F", "<Important>You now have a goal that requires several steps to achieve!</>

To obtain the <Item>Mining Explosives</> required to blast your way through, you'll need to refine different resources at several <Important>Facilities</>, before <Important>Crafting</> them.

As a reminder, new <Important>Facility Plans</> have been unlocked and are available for expanding your <Important>Outpost</> to achieve this goal.

Refer back to your <Important>Journal</> <Cyan>(J)</> to reference the steps required to proceed into the next area of the cavern.")
